violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine)observed with black residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service to be wash and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

The floors in back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or pooled water. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine and hotel pans) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024
Inspector observed sheet pans stored facing upwards. Equipment must be stored inverted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the beverage station. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024
The plumbing to the (drive-thru) handsink is in poor repair. Inspector observed a leak. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024
Inspector observed cleaning tool stored above single service and food items. PIC removed tool. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

The soda tubes and flooring under the soda machine in the dining area and coving under the front counter are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of gray residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023
The plumbing to the 3 bay sink is in poor repair. Leak observed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

The floor in the cooking area is in poor repair. Inspector observed missing tiles and an accumulation of water. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2023

The floor in the soda fountain area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023
